## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run coverage` passes (100% stmt/fn/line coverage, 99% branch)
- [ ] If this changes `src/evaluator.ts` or `src/lattice.ts`: cites the exact paper section (§X.Y) or ADR
- [ ] If this is a bug fix: includes a regression test that fails without this change
